# Oryele

> Oryele is an enterprise execution platform for governed AI digital workers, workflow automation, document intelligence, communications, integrations, analytics, and operational control.

## Primary pages
- [Home](https://oryele.ai/): Company and platform overview
- [Platform](https://oryele.ai/platform.html): Enterprise execution platform
- [Digital Workforce](https://oryele.ai/digital-workforce.html): Governed AI digital workers
- [Workflow Engine](https://oryele.ai/workflow-engine.html): Workflow orchestration
- [Solutions](https://oryele.ai/solutions.html): Industry and operational solutions
- [Accounting](https://oryele.ai/accounting.html): Accounting-firm workflows
- [Insurance](https://oryele.ai/insurance.html): Insurance workflows
- [Legal](https://oryele.ai/legal.html): Legal workflows
- [Integrations](https://oryele.ai/integrations.html): Enterprise integrations
- [Trust](https://oryele.ai/trust.html): Security, governance, and trust
- [Resources](https://oryele.ai/resources.html): White papers and resources
- [Contact](https://oryele.ai/contact.html): Contact and enterprise briefing

## Policies
- [Privacy](https://oryele.ai/privacy.html)
- [Terms](https://oryele.ai/terms.html)
- [Cookie Policy](https://oryele.ai/cookies.html)
- [SMS Consent](https://oryele.ai/sms-consent.html)
